review_text: I have repeatedly raised concerns regarding a discrepancy in my mutual fund investment, but I do not feel that my issue is being properly investigated. My invested amount was showing approximately ₹1,05,000, and later it dropped to around ₹85,000 without any redemption or transaction initiated by me. I am also unable to find records that explain this change. This is a serious matter involving my hard-earned money. I request a detailed audit trail of all transactions, folio movements, unit bala

review_text: I had a pathetic experience with Groww app. Recently I had changed the nominee details and got updated in DP. After allocation of units, it was found that the nomination was marked to old nominee and not the latest one that got updated in DP. I contacted their chat support. It didn't give proper answer. Then I called their customer care. They assured that the details will.be corrected. However they didn't.

The app offers a clean, user-friendly interface with smooth navigation and fast order execution. It provides all the essential features for investing and trading, including stocks, mutual funds, and F&O trading, in one place. Portfolio tracking is simple, and the platform is easy to use for both beginners and experienced traders. 🥰🥰🥰

author: SHYAM MOHAN PANDEY
review_text: Groww is one of the most beginner-friendly Android investment apps I’ve used. The interface is clean, SIP setup for mutual funds is simple, and buying stocks/ETFs is straightforward. Portfolio tracking across investments is convenient, and onboarding is mostly digital. The trade-off is that research tools and advanced trading features are not as deep as specialized trading platforms. For long-term investors and first-time users, it’s an excellent choice.

author: PIYUSH KHANDELWAL
review_text: Very disappointing experience. After using the external fund import feature, I started receiving unwanted OTPs, spam calls, and promotional messages. I tested this on two separate devices and faced the same issue both times. I do not have proof that these events are directly connected to the app, but the coincidence is difficult to ignore. For a platform that handles sensitive financial information, this creates serious concerns about privacy, security, and transparency. very disappointed 😞

author: Tahseen Khan
review_text: Please use 1 lot as the default value. Currently, I noticed that if I buy 3 lots, then the next time I buy any Nifty option, it sets the lot size to 3 lots. Suggestions - A) Setting up multiple SL & TGT on the same trade is very non-intuitive. Hope the developer is simplifying it. B) Why can't we have a drag SL and TGT option when trading intraday stocks, like in NIFTY option trading?

author: MIR FAYAZ
review_text: I have been using Groww since February 2022, and my investment journey began on this platform. I also opened my first Demat Account through Groww. The app has a very simple, clean, and user-friendly interface, which makes it easy for new investors to start investing. My experience investing in stocks, mutual funds, and IPOs has been excellent. Even today, Groww remains one of my favorite investment apps. I would definitely recommend it to anyone who is new to investing. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

author: Soumik Ghosh
review_text: শিক্ষার জিনিস এই স্টক মার্কেট,আমি এখন শিখছি এখান থেকে ভালো লাগছে উৎসাহ বাড়ছে আমার মধ্যে কিন্তু এখন মার্কেট খারাপ যাচ্ছে ,খারাপের পরেই ভালো আসবে সেটার কথা ভেবেই এগিয়ে যাচ্ছি ।ভবিষ্যৎ কিভাবে নিজেকে আরো সমৃদ্ধি করবো সেটা নিয়ে ভাবনায় আছি ।আমার চিন্তা ভাবনা যদি ঠিক থাকে পরবর্তী কালে আমি আরো এগিয়ে যেতে পারবো আশা রাখছি নিজের উপরে তবে মার্কেট যদি ভালো হত আরো অনেকের ই ইন্টারেস্ট বাড়তো গ্রো আপ্স এর মাধ্যম এ আমিও আরো কিছু ইনভেস্ট করতে পারতাম রেগুলার ত করতে পারছিনা যে টুকু করছি অন্য জায়গা থেকে সঞ্চয় করছি ।।
